title: AIBOUX Shop Account Order Favorite Retail Flow WIP
summary: Account, order history, favorites, subscription mypage, login, and register pages were improved as part of the Amazon-quality Shop sales sprint.
My page and account now expose a buyer command center for orders, delivery/returns, subscriptions, and contact.
Order history now has order lookup, delivery, returns, and contact operation routes instead of only a thin empty state.
Favorites now has comparison actions for price, stock, cart, and shopping conditions.
Subscription mypage now shows delivery, frequency, skip, and cancellation-condition guidance.
Login/register now validate input and do not pretend that account completion occurred.
This is WIP evidence, not FINAL_ACCEPTED.
